signup.title: Welcome to Avante
signup.subtitle: Let's take care of your time together
signup.divider: OR CREATE YOUR ACCOUNT WITH EMAIL

errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
errors.serverError: Server error, please try again later
errors.connectionError: Could not connect to the server

emailVerified.title: Account verified!
emailVerified.subtitle: You can now sign in with your email and password.

pendingVerification.title: Check your inbox
pendingVerification.subtitle: We sent a verification link to:
pendingVerification.instruction: Tap the link in the email to activate your account. It may take a few minutes.

forgotPw.title: Recover your password
forgotPw.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions
forgotPw.successSubtitle: We sent you a link to reset your password. Tap the link in the email to continue.

resetPw.title: New password
resetPw.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPw.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the code from the email

onboarding.title: Meet your turtle
onboarding.subtitle: Your companion on this journey. She'll celebrate every win with you.
onboarding.mascotMessage: Hi! So happy to meet you.
onboarding.errorMsg: Check your connection and try again.

personal.one: 1 moment for you · keep it up
personal.other: {{count}} moments for you · keep it up

tuga.weekCaption: {{count}} moments flowing between your three worlds

eventSheet.errorMsg: Check your connection and try again.

eventSheet.conflictTight: Tight margin · «{{titleA}}» at {{timeA}} and «{{titleB}}» at {{timeB}} · will save anyway
eventSheet.deleteRecurringMsg: What would you like to delete?

progress.empty: What do you want to achieve today? Write it down.
progress.start: Start whenever you're ready, no rush!
progress.done: All done! Today was a great day.
progress.half: Going well — {{done}} of {{total}}. Keep it up!

tasks.errorSave: Could not save the task. Check your connection and try again.
tasks.errorToggle: Could not save the change. Check your connection and try again.
tasks.errorDelete: Could not delete the task. Check your connection and try again.

afternoon: What do you feel like this afternoon?
mascot.excited: You've got something soon. Let's go!
mascot.lowEnergy: Every day counts. You've got this!

balance.title: In balance
balance.subtitle: Your three worlds breathe in harmony.

messages.title: Day complete!
messages.body: Every step matters and today you took them all 🎉

messages.title: Amazing!
messages.body: You really looked after yourself today 💚

messages.title: Everything checked off!
messages.body: That's what real self-care looks like 🏆

celebration.streakDay_1: 🔥 Your first streak day of the week! Keep it up!
celebration.streakDay_2: 🔥 Second day in a row! Keep going!
celebration.streakDay_3: 🔥 Third day in a row! Keep going!
celebration.streakDay_4: 🔥 Fourth day in a row! Keep going!
celebration.streakDay_5: 🔥 Fifth day in a row! Keep going!
celebration.streakDay_6: 🔥 Sixth day in a row! Keep going!
celebration.streak: 🔥 {{count}} days in a row taking care of yourself

dayCheck.savedText: Saved. Your stats will reflect this.
dayCheck.notesPlaceholder: Anything you want to remember from today (optional)

medium.label: Tough but okay
medium.hint: Busy, but I got through it

bad.label: Hard day
bad.hint: Heavy, low energy, lots of pressure

family: A week without family plans. A dinner, a call, an outing? 🐢
Time with family is the kind that stays with you. Shall we make room?
One small thing this week can mean a lot 🐢
What simple plan could you have with your family this week?
work: It's been a while since you logged any work. Anything worth remembering? 🐢
Is there a meeting or task that deserves a spot on the calendar?
One entry can make the whole week feel clearer 🐢
What's on your work agenda that you haven't added yet?
personal: Your personal time deserves a place on the calendar too 🐢
Something for you this week? An appointment, a hobby, a quiet moment.
Taking care of yourself takes planning too. Want to add something? 🐢
Is there something you want to do for yourself that's still not scheduled?

mascot.invalidNameMsg: Please write at least one character.

calendar.description: Import your Google Calendar events and organize them by life area.
calendar.noSync: Not synced yet — tap Sync now
calendar.disconnectMsg: Synced events will be removed. Continue?

celebration.hapticsHint: Haptic pulse when all tasks are done

community.shareHint: Recommend us to someone who might like it
community.shareMessage: I'm using Avante to organise my time with balance. It's free and has a turtle that cheers you on.
community.comingSoon: Coming soon to the App Store

support.title: Buy me a coffee
support.description: Avante is free and made with care. If it helps you, consider supporting the project.

about.title: About Avante
about.description: Avante helps you organise your time without losing sight of what matters: the balance between work, family, and yourself. In the Balance section you can set your weekly goals and track your progress day by day. {{mascotName}}, your turtle, walks alongside you to celebrate your wins and cheer you on.
about.creditsText: Turtle animations by Bashir Ahmad and other authors via LottieFiles. Lottie Simple License.

about.title: About
about.animationsCredit: Turtle animations: Bashir Ahmad and other authors from LottieFiles.

dailyCheck.title: How was your day?
dailyCheck.body: Takes 5 seconds to rate it. Your stats will reflect it.
